MY GRIND
The Daily Work Starts Here
📋 Today's Plan
What today calls for. Tap each as you complete it. Resets at midnight.
📋 This Month — April Focus
Tap each one as you live it this month. Resets when the month flips.
🗒️ Coach's Note — April
"The season is long, but it goes fast. You will blink and it will be June. Take it one game at a time — stay present, stay humble, and play for your team. The best players I have ever coached were the ones who made everyone around them better. Be that player."

— The Grind
⚾  APRIL — In-Season · One Game at a Time. Stay present. Team first.

DAILY JOURNAL
🎯 Today's Grind
➕ New Entry
🏋️ Pre-Workout Warm-up
Prime the body before lifting. Skip this and you risk pulls. Resets at midnight.
💪 Arm & Shoulder Care — Today
Non-negotiable daily. Resets at midnight.
🔢 Rep Counter — Today's Practice
Tap the range that matches your day. Don't know exact? Don't worry — just commit a range.

✉️ Invite Sponsored Players
Send players a sponsor invite. When they open the link, they'll be added to your roster with full access — no payment required. Existing paid players can also join without using a seat (they keep their own plan).
👥 Roster Management
Sponsored players shown first. Removing a sponsored player frees their seat and gives them a 7-day grace period before losing access.
⚾
No players on your roster yet. Share your sponsor invite above.
🗓️ Season-End Roster Review
End of season? Run a roster review — keep your returners, cut the ones moving on, and free up seats before next year. This also runs automatically on your sponsorship anniversary.

⚙️ SETTINGS
Notifications · Preferences · Account
🔔 Notifications
Daily reminders are enabled by default at 7:30 PM. Tap the button below to allow notifications — you can turn them off anytime with the toggle above.
📓 Daily Journal Reminder
Reminds you to log today's game or practice
⏰ Reminder Time
Default: 7:30 PM daily
Tap the button above then tap "Allow" when your browser asks.
iPhone users: app must be installed to home screen first.
🎛️ App Preferences
Auto-save Journal Entries
Save drafts as you type
Stats Auto-Populate from Journal
Game stats fill My Stats automatically
Show Install Prompt
Remind me to add to home screen
Scroll to Top on Tab Switch
Page scrolls up when changing tabs
💾 Backup & Restore
Your data lives on this device. Download a backup file to keep it safe. If you switch phones or clear your browser, you can restore everything from that file.
